name_cn:
Authentic Grade
✈Goyard ♛ Card bag 🏷Essential for daily matching 💳
🔖G0YARD (Goyard) was founded in 1853 and has a history of over 160 years. The fabric is woven from a blend of linen, cotton, and hemp fibers, then coated with glossy shellac, making it waterproof, sturdy, and durable. Highly sought after by celebrities, royalty, and the aristocracy 🎉🎉
Uses exclusive wallet-matching custom glossy leather ✅Perfect diagonal stitching 🧵✅The yellow interior part is custom matching top-grain cowhide [⚠️Not PU leather ❌Not split leather ❌]
